name.description: OPTIONAL operator-supplied display label (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.7). The server mints the opaque worker_id; the caller never supplies it. Display-name well-formedness (length, charset) and reserved-name rejection (`admin`, `system`, `internal`) are enforced server-side → 422 eden://error/invalid-name; an ill-formed name is NOT a request-validation (400) failure.

labels.description: Free-form deployment metadata; protocol does not interpret labels.
